_note: Curated map of driver gene or marker to an approved or basket-level targeted therapy, for cross-condition translation. Every entry carries a real citation (PMID). tier: 1 tissue agnostic or strongly established approval, 2 approved in another condition on the shared target or prospective basket signal, 3 mechanistic. tissue_agnostic true means the FDA label is biomarker defined across tumor types. This is research decision support, not medical advice.

NTRK1.approved_in: NTRK fusion positive solid tumors (tissue agnostic)

citation.label: Hong et al., Lancet Oncol 2020 (larotrectinib in TRK fusion cancers)

NTRK2.approved_in: NTRK fusion positive solid tumors (tissue agnostic)

citation.label: Hong et al., Lancet Oncol 2020 (larotrectinib in TRK fusion cancers)

NTRK3.approved_in: NTRK fusion positive solid tumors (tissue agnostic)

citation.label: Doebele et al., Lancet Oncol 2020 (entrectinib in NTRK fusion cancers)
Subbiah et al., J Clin Oncol 2022 (tissue agnostic dabrafenib plus trametinib in BRAF V600E)

RET.approved_in: RET fusion positive solid tumors (tissue agnostic)

citation.label: Subbiah et al., J Clin Oncol 2024 (tissue agnostic selpercatinib in RET fusion cancers)
Meric-Bernstam et al., J Clin Oncol 2024 (tissue agnostic trastuzumab deruxtecan in HER2 IHC 3+)
Meric-Bernstam et al., J Clin Oncol 2024 (tissue agnostic trastuzumab deruxtecan in HER2 IHC 3+)

KIT.moa: KIT and PDGFRA tyrosine kinase inhibitor
KIT.caveat: sensitivity depends on the specific KIT variant; the KIT D816V allele common in systemic mastocytosis is imatinib resistant and is instead targeted by avapritinib or midostaurin

citation.label: Demetri et al., N Engl J Med 2002 (imatinib in KIT positive GIST)
Heinrich et al., Lancet Oncol 2020 (avapritinib in PDGFRA D842V GIST)

PDGFB.moa: PDGF receptor inhibition of the autocrine loop

citation.label: McArthur et al., J Clin Oncol 2005 (imatinib in COL1A1::PDGFB DFSP)
Abou-Alfa et al., Lancet Oncol 2020 (ClarIDHy, ivosidenib in IDH1 mutant cholangiocarcinoma)
Abou-Alfa et al., Lancet Oncol 2020 (FIGHT-202, pemigatinib in FGFR2 fusion cholangiocarcinoma)

EZH2.approved_in: EZH2 mutant follicular lymphoma and INI1 negative epithelioid sarcoma

citation.label: Chi et al., J Natl Cancer Inst 2023 (tazemetostat in SMARCB1 or EZH2 altered tumors)

SMARCB1.moa: EZH2 inhibition exploiting SWI/SNF loss driven PRC2 dependency

citation.label: Gounder et al., Lancet Oncol 2020 (tazemetostat in INI1 negative epithelioid sarcoma)

SMARCA4.approved_in: SMARCA4 or SMARCB1 loss (basket, prospective signal)

citation.label: Chi et al., J Natl Cancer Inst 2023 (Pediatric MATCH tazemetostat basket)

MET.approved_in: MET altered tumors including TFE3 rearranged (basket signal)
MET.moa: MET and ALK tyrosine kinase inhibitor

citation.label: Schoffski et al., Lancet Respir/CREATE 2018 (crizotinib in MET driven alveolar soft part sarcoma)

TFE3.approved_in: TFE3 rearranged tumors via MET upregulation (basket signal)
TFE3.moa: MET inhibition downstream of TFE3 fusion

citation.label: Schoffski et al., CREATE 2018 (crizotinib in MET driven tumors)

DLL3.approved_in: DLL3 expressing small cell lung cancer and neuroendocrine tumors
DLL3.moa: DLL3 by CD3 bispecific T cell engager

citation.label: Ahn et al., N Engl J Med 2023 (DeLLphi-301, tarlatamab in DLL3 positive small cell lung cancer)

SSTR2.approved_in: Somatostatin receptor positive gastroenteropancreatic neuroendocrine tumors

citation.label: Strosberg et al., J Clin Oncol 2022 (NETTER-1 long term, 177Lu-DOTATATE)

BRCA1.approved_in: BRCA mutant or homologous recombination deficient tumors

citation.label: Ledermann et al., Lancet Oncol 2014 (olaparib maintenance in BRCA mutant ovarian cancer)

BRCA2.approved_in: BRCA mutant or homologous recombination deficient tumors

citation.label: Ledermann et al., Lancet Oncol 2014 (olaparib maintenance in BRCA mutant ovarian cancer)

KRAS.approved_in: KRAS G12C non small cell lung cancer and colorectal cancer
KRAS.caveat: only the KRAS G12C allele is targeted by sotorasib or adagrasib; other KRAS alleles such as G12D, G12V, and Q61 are not yet addressed by an approved agent

citation.label: Skoulidis et al., N Engl J Med 2021 (CodeBreaK100, sotorasib in KRAS G12C lung cancer)

ALK.approved_in: ALK rearranged non small cell lung cancer, inflammatory myofibroblastic tumor, and anaplastic large cell lymphoma
ALK.caveat: requires an ALK fusion or rearrangement; next generation inhibitors such as alectinib and lorlatinib are preferred in several settings

citation.label: Solomon et al., N Engl J Med 2014 (PROFILE 1014, first line crizotinib in ALK positive lung cancer)
